notes: 19890 Southwest Fwy is part of Riverpark Shopping Center, owned and managed by Phillips Edison & Company (PECO) — consistent with permit description naming Phillips Edison. The permit is for exterior facade improvements to the retail center. Tenants include H-E-B, Dave & Buster's, Ace Pickleball Club (opening 2026 at former Gander Mountain 33,740 sq ft space), LA Fitness, Dollar Tree, Chick-fil-A, Sport Clips, Massage Envy, Bank of America. Primary contact through PECO; no single-tenant phone available for this parcel.
